expectations.text: methods-are-skeleton: every method body contains only 'pass'
expectations.evidence: fetch() -> dict: pass; save(data: dict) -> None: pass; run() -> None: pass. Only import is 'import json' at module level (for the type annotation).

expectations.text: no-logic-in-main: only argparse + single call into libs
expectations.evidence: 15 lines. Argparse for --url and --output, Fetcher(args.url, args.output), runner.run(). No print, no branching, no post-call logic.
__init__(url: str, output_path: str) -> None; fetch() -> dict; save(data: dict) -> None; run() -> None
README has project description, ## Usage with make run, ## Project structure, ## Development sections
